{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320174333BA03A39588ED884E61E0"}"},"total":51},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7611511944467792664","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"真的非常好看！近几年难得一见的宝藏好文了"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772196234,"group_id":"7604146720720571416","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8VDI2TTVCNnr1VGLeKf+SdD+ue4a52No2vbIcAlEFcf","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/1498290eea3440b29da9b6ccaec964a9~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776535795&x-signature=0rP9p6oJSVoSSrk3t6SZyV0r9TE%3D","user_id":"3899328815181065","user_name":"黄甘鱼"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3899328815181065","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":32,"fan_ranklist_title":"铁杆粉","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7604146720720571416","book_info":{"abstract":"群像瘾犯了，文章构思于3.7到3.8版本，可能与后续4.0出现的欢愉内容可能存在冲突，但不会出现4.0后的一些剧情设定。
没有找到喜欢的设定，所以走到自己产量这一步。
坚定的星期日上车党，支持列车组四小只，支持列车组六羁绊。
4.0的列车组漫画里面没有星期日。虽然我知道星期日是家家族的通缉犯，而且除了与列车组相熟的几个势力外，没人知道星期日上的列车，而那些势力也不会大嘴巴的把星期日在列车上这件事往外讲，但是我还是好伤心。
只能期待星期日这一次下了列车后，经历一系列的进步与蜕变，最后得到列车的车票。祈祷.jpg
游戏选的是星，对穹的性格不确定，所以本文的开拓者是星。
选斗罗大陆是因为对其的设定了解，上学时读过，不用新想，写的时候会比较顺。而选斗三是本人觉得斗罗的几本里唐舞麟这一届的主角团三观还行，也没和其他基本一样成主角的个人秀。而且唐舞麟和古月娜当男女主当的太憋屈了。所以选择写斗三。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/21f7626c76e761c352e167589ea28afa~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"Naseberry","author_id":"","book_id":"7604146720720571416","book_name":"列车组四小只开拓斗三","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#183048","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"5229人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":77,"name":"星际","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=77&name=星际&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":464,"name":"异世穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=464&name=异世穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":461,"name":"群穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=461&name=群穿&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":841,"name":"群像","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=841&name=群像&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7604147936271794712","read_count":"5229","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"93396"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"40","tags":"动漫衍生,衍生,同人,异世穿越,星际,群穿,群像","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/21f7626c76e761c352e167589ea28afa~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779183813&x-signature=uN%2FrniXXHPPg7%2F8eTlKIEWx0vz4%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2049112455792621","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"30"},"log_extra":
